mapper.select: SELECT t.type_code ,t.project_code ,p.project_name ,t.type_name ,t.start_at ,t.end_at ,t.is_deleted FROM types t JOIN projects p ON t.project_code = p.project_code WHERE t.is_deleted != 1 ORDER BY t.type_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO types (project_code, type_name, start_at, end_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{projectCode}, #{typeName}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, '0')
